summary: DeepPrep MVP tested end-to-end. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass against the public preview URL (health, free-scan eligibility + create + already_used 403 abuse block, entitlement sync devMockUnlock, full report generation with dossiers/questions/talkingPoints/dayOfBrief, 402 no_active_subscription, panel brief = 2 credits vs standard = 1 credit, usage endpoint, and privacy delete). Frontend: full onboarding (9 steps with company+role required at step 4 and interviewer required at step 6) -> free-scan theatre -> result screen with 90% Match Confidence + insights + See Full Report -> Review page (Love it + Continue, no X) -> HARD paywall (verified NO close/X button, Continue + Restore Purchases visible) -> generating -> Report screen (all 4 tabs Overview/Dossiers/Questions/Day-of render, 2 dossier cards, Dossier detail screen opens, Copy day-of button visible) -> Home tab (credits pill shows 6 credits, next interview card, New Brief button, recent briefs, bottom tabs) -> Settings (subscription card, restore, privacy, terms, delete data) -> Legal (privacy) screen navigates. Dev mock unlock via /api/entitlement/sync works, credit decrement correct (7 -> 6 after 1-credit brief). No deprecated Expo packages found. No red screen errors. Free-scan abuse protection verified (second create returns 403 already_used).

issues: Dossier detail screen initially shows 'Loading…' briefly after opening from Dossiers tab — data is refetched even though it exists in the report already in memory. Consider hydrating from the current report state to avoid the empty-state flash. Reference: /app/frontend/app/dossier/[id].tsx

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking on iOS builds but should be tracked to keep RN 0.74+ compatibility clean. Likely from a third-party component in /app/frontend/src/components. Reference: browser console warnings during Home render.

action_items: Optional: hydrate Interviewer Dossier detail from the already-loaded report to avoid the brief 'Loading…' flash.
Optional: track the 'props.pointerEvents' RN web deprecation warning in a follow-up (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'). Consider migrating to the lifespan context manager before production (non-blocking).

routes_reports.py refund path on LLM failure mutates the entitlement doc via a read-modify-write ($set of full ent) — not concurrency-safe. Use $inc for credits to avoid lost updates under contention.
entitlement_service.consume_credits also uses read-modify-write on ent.credits — same $inc recommendation for atomicity.
Free-scan abuse protection is device-scoped only; IP/UA hashes are stored but not enforced. Fine for MVP but flag for production alongside App Attest verification (already TODO in code).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows (onboarding, free-scan, review, paywall, report tabs, dossier detail, home, settings, legal)

seed_data_creation: None — each test uses a fresh TEST_<uuid> deviceId to respect free-scan one-time abuse rule.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Frontend flows all pass with mobile viewport 390x844. Use unique deviceIds for repeated free-scan tests. Report screen tab testIDs are capitalized: tab-Overview, tab-Dossiers, tab-Questions, tab-Day-of. Paywall MUST NOT have a close/X (intentional HARD paywall). devMockUnlock=true is enabled and unlocks entitlement with 7 credits (INTRO 1 + WEEKLY 6). Backend at ${EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL}/api. Mocks in play: ENABLE_MOCK_LLM=true, ENABLE_MOCK_SEARCH=true, StoreKit stubbed via devMockUnlock (all MOCKED as intended for this build).
